backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the vehicle service booking backend with types for bookings, CRUD operations (create, get, update status), and mechanic assignment stored in an in-memory map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the Layout component header was updated to render 'Clean' in orange and 'io' in white using two separate spans.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties using OKLCH values for the shadcn-ui design token system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Cleanio React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, full-service, repair, cleaning, confirmation, admin/bookings) wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: Shared booking form component handling customer details, vehicle type, capacity, time slot selection, and cleaning sub-option mapping before submitting to the backend via the createBooking mutation.
frontend/src/components/ChatBot.tsx: Reusable chat UI component rendering bot and user message bubbles with a typing indicator, quick-reply buttons, and a free-text input field for open-ended responses.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header (logo + desktop/mobile nav), main content area, and footer. Navigation links include Home, Full Service, Repair, Cleaning, and Admin, with active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for CRUD operations on bookings (get all, get one, create, update status, assign mechanic) by calling the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRepairConversation: Implements a multi-step chatbot conversation flow for diagnosing bike repair issues, managing message state and conversation steps (issue category, detail, severity, duration) with quick-reply options.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with Cleanio's charcoal/orange brand CSS variables, and defines reusable component and utility classes (buttons, cards, chat bubbles, glow effects).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminBookingsPage.tsx: Admin page that lists all bookings with cards showing customer info, service details, and controls to update booking status and assign a mechanic via dropdown and input fields.
frontend/src/pages/BookingConfirmationPa: Confirmation page displayed after a successful booking, showing booking ID, customer name, service type, time slot, status, and mechanic assignment details fetched by booking ID.
frontend/src/pages/CleaningPage.tsx: Cleaning service page that lets users choose between Colour Foam Washing (₹199) or Normal Foam Washing (₹149) options before presenting the BookingForm component.
frontend/src/pages/FullServicePage.tsx: Full service booking page that displays a list of included maintenance items and renders the BookingForm configured for full-service with capacity selector and pricing.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showcasing the three available services (Full Service, Repair, Cleaning) with feature highlights and navigation buttons to each service booking page.
frontend/src/pages/RepairPage.tsx: Repair service page that guides users through an AI chatbot conversation to diagnose their issue, then reveals the BookingForm with the collected repair details once the chat is complete.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Cleanio frontend, extending the theme with custom colors (oklch-based), fonts (Inter/Poppins), border radii, box shadows, and enabling dark mode, typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Cleanio project at version 3, recording existing features (orange/white wordmark styling) and pending feature requests (bike logo in header, styled 'Clean'/'io' text).
